series_metadata.series_title: Deposits held by bank compared to total bank assets and deposits requested (BANK MAX)
series_metadata.series_description: Weekly reports generated by the Trust department used to verify that banks on the Ohio Board of Deposit''s list of approved depository banks to hold state funds (1) do not hold state deposits in an amount that exceeds the maximum amount requested by the bank, and (2) do not hold state deposits in excess of 30% of the bank''s total assets, as required by R.C. 135.03.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain until the later of the following: the conclusion of current fiscal year and for two additional fiscal years, or until annual audit of Treasurer for corresponding fiscal year by Auditor of State is complete and final audit report has been published. ; Electronic: Retain until the later of the following: the conclusion of current fiscal year and for two additional fiscal years, or until annual audit of Treasurer for corresponding fiscal year by Auditor of State is complete and final audit report has been published., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
